content.en:
"Lord of Blood Demons, this Extreme Treasure is mine, you dare to fight with me and seek death!"

The Lord of the Stone Pupils said angrily.

"Hahaha, Lord of Stone Pupils, although you are the perfect controller of the Extreme Realm, I also have a backer, but I am not afraid of you. Besides, the Extreme Path Treasure is the Extreme Dao Demon Ape's thing, and anyone can snatch it!" said the Blood Demon Lord.

"Then let's see who's better!"

The Lord of Stone Pupils said coldly.

Thundered!!!

The Lord of the Stone Pupil and the Lord of the Blood Demon are constantly fighting, their strength far surpasses that of other Extreme Path creatures, and the power of each blow seems to be able to severely damage or even kill the perfect controller of the General True Realm, and their strength has reached an incredible level.

"What a strong strength!"

Ye Tian was slightly startled.

This is the strength of the top True Realm Perfect Controller, even in the Extreme Demon Ape Graveyard, when the strength is suppressed, it can exert such terrifying strength.

Compared to the perfect controller of the Void Realm that he killed, the two extreme creatures of the Stone Pupil and the Blood Demon Lord were the real great horrors, even if he could exert all his strength here, he would not be able to shake them in the slightest, the difference in strength was too great.

Suddenly.

The Lord of the Stone Pupil performed an Extreme Dao Pupil Technique, which instantly injured the Extreme Dao Will of the Lord of the Blood Demon.

The two Extreme Creatures fought for a while, and the Blood Demon Lord's huge world-like body was beaten smaller and smaller, and the blood-colored light on his body became more and more dim.

Suddenly.

In the hand of the Lord of the Stone Pupils, an Extreme Path Treasure appeared - the Extreme Path Stone Spear.

"Give me death!"

The Lord of Stone Pupils said coldly.

The Extreme Stone Spear cooperated with the Extreme Dao Control Technique of the Lord of the Stone Pupil, shattering all defenses, directly piercing through the Lord of the Blood Demon, and even directly smashing a top-notch super-grade perfect treasure on the Lord of the Blood Demon.

"Damn Lord of Stone Pupils, you wait for me!"

The Lord of the Blood Demon instantly turned into a blood shadow and disappeared.

The Lord of the Stone Pupil did not chase and kill the Lord of the Blood Demon, because he couldn't kill him, at most he would only injure him, if the Lord of the Blood Demon was desperate, he might not be able to please him.

After all, the Lord of the Blood Demon is also a very ancient True Realm Perfect Controller of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, and it is not far from the Extreme Realm Perfect Controller, no one knows how many hole cards there are.

Besides, the Lord of the Blood Demon also has a backer, and he doesn't dare to kill the Lord of the Blood Demon.

Soon, most of the resources here were seized by the Lord of the Stone Pupil.

Although the other Extreme Dao creatures were a little dissatisfied, their strength was not as good as that of the Lord of the Stone Pupil, and they didn't dare to say anything.

Next, Ye Tian also found a lot of good things, but he didn't see the treasures that were too precious, such as the level of the Extreme Dao Treasure.

Even if you really see him, it won't be his turn!

Ye Tian is not very demanding, after all, his strength cannot be compared with those True Realm Perfect Controllers, even if it is a powerful Void Realm Perfect Controller, he can't kill them, and he doesn't dare to expose all his extreme power.

Therefore, he only hoped to obtain some treasures that were beneficial to himself, such as the Extreme Dao Golden Fruit, which could help him break the chains of the Extreme Dao and greatly improve his strength.

Gradually, some places on the periphery of the Extreme Dao Demon Ape Cemetery were scraped over and over again by the Extreme Dao creatures.

At this time, the Extreme Creatures broke the space-time passage into the inner enclosure and began to search for treasures in the inner enclosure area.

And in the inner area, there are more battles, and melee battles between many extreme creatures break out at every turn, after all, once something good is found, who wants to quit?

If you don't quit, then there will be only war!

In the inner area, many treasures are shrouded in magic circles, and it is difficult to break through the formation, and it takes a lot of time.

Moreover, some of the magic circles are more complicated and difficult to break.

"This was originally one of the lairs of the Extreme Dao Demon Ape, and the formations here should have been arranged by him, and it seems that there are also extremely proficient formations among the Extreme Dao creatures!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

At this moment, he came to a magic circle.

The laws here are very complicated, and they actually involve thirty-six kinds of extreme path powers, and after many extreme path creatures came here, they took a look at it and immediately left.

It's not that they're not interested in the treasures here, but they feel that if they want to crack the formation here, they need at least a number of Extreme Path creatures to work together, not to mention whether they can find Extreme Path creatures who happen to be proficient in the magic circle, even if they really find it, I'm afraid it will be a waste of a long time.

And the benefits of the cemetery don't stop here, so there's no need to slowly crack the circle here.

But Ye Tian had comprehended too many extreme paths, so he was sure that he could crack this magic circle alone.

"With so much extreme power used to arrange the magic circle, I'm afraid there are a lot of treasures left here!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

So, Ye Tian began to analyze this magic circle, and with his comprehension of many extreme paths and his own anti-heaven understanding, the mystery of this magic circle was analyzed by him little by little.

Time passed slowly, and after a long time, although Ye Tian had not fully comprehended the mystery of this magic circle, he could enter this magic circle.

In an instant, thirty-six extreme path powers appeared on Ye Tian's body, and these thirty-six extreme path powers enveloped Ye Tian and fused into a ray of light with a special fluctuation.

In an instant, Ye Tian relied on this light, and when the magic circle changed to a certain moment, he directly penetrated into the magic circle.

"Come in!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

As soon as he came in, Ye Tian saw a mountain.

"This is supposed to be a treasure land, but it was moved here by the Extreme Demon Ape!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

At this time, many treasures were bred on this treasure mountain, and Ye Tian put them away one by one.

"Extreme Golden Flower !!"

Ye Tian saw a lot of flowers growing on a cliff, releasing infinite golden light, shining on endless time and space.

This is one of the few treasures that can assist in breaking the chains of the Extreme Dao as well as the Extreme Dao Golden Fruit, and the effect of the Extreme Dao Golden Flower is better, but the Extreme Dao Golden Flower in the Extreme Deep Sea is many times less than the Extreme Dao Golden Fruit.

"Hundreds of Extreme Golden Flowers, make a lot of money!"

Ye Tian did not hesitate to take all the Extreme Dao Golden Flowers here.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to take almost all the resources on this mountain.

Mountaintop.

A gray boulder is constantly absorbing the power of the extreme path around it.

Ye Tian stood in front of the gray stone, silently studying.

"If I'm not mistaken, this thing should be Extreme Gray Stone!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He had browsed a lot of information about the treasures of the Extreme Dao before, among which there were records of the Extreme Path Gray Stone, but there were very few records of the records.

But the value of Extreme Limestone is very high, and it is extremely rare.

Such a large Extreme Dao Gray Stone has the hope of cultivating an Extreme Dao Treasure.

"It is said that the super-grade perfect treasure that is being conceived, if the Extreme Path Gray Stone is integrated into it, the Extreme Path Origin of the Super Perfect Treasure can be transformed and promoted to the Extreme Path Treasure!"

Ye Tian secretly excited.

If this was really the case, he could use this Extreme Path Greystone to merge into the Super Perfect Treasure of the Nine Rivers Void and transform it into an Extreme Path Treasure.

In that case, he will also have an extreme treasure!
